warehouseQuery.query:
select CLM_F.CLM_ID,
	CLM_F.EXP_SUB_CAT_CD,
	CLM_F.CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK,
	MBR_D.MBR_BRTH_DT_SK,
	MBR_D.MBR_FULL_NM,
	MBR_D.MBR_ID,
	MBR_D.MBR_SK,
	MBR_D.SUB_ID,
	CLM_F.SRC_SYS_CD,
	CLM_F.FUND_CAT_CD,
	CLM_LN_DIAG_I.DIAG_CD as PregnancyDiag,
	CLM_LN_DIAG_I.DIAG_CD_DESC as PregnancyDiagDesc,
	CLM_LN_DIAG_I.DIAG_CD_TYP_NM
from CLM_F 
	inner join CLM_LN_DIAG_I on CLM_LN_DIAG_I.CLM_ID = CLM_F.CLM_ID 
	inner join MBR_D on MBR_D.MBR_SK = CLM_F.MBR_SK 
	inner join GRP_D on GRP_D.GRP_SK = MBR_D.GRP_SK
where CLM_F.CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK Between CHAR(((Current Date + 1 Days - Day(Current Date) Days) - 12 Months), ISO) 
	and CHAR((LAST_Day(Current Date - 0 Months)), ISO) 
	and CLM_F.CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK not Like '%UNK%' 
	and CLM_F.CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK not Like '%NA%' 
	and left(CLM_LN_DIAG_I.DIAG_CD, 2) in ('Z3', 'O8', 'O9', 'O0', 'O6')
	and CLM_F.CLM_HOST_IN = 'N' 
	and CLM_F.CLM_STTUS_CD IN ('A02', 'A08', 'A09') 
	and CLM_F.CLM_TYP_CD = 'MED' 
	and CLM_F.CLM_CAT_CD = 'STD' 
	and CLM_F.CLM_FINL_DISP_CD = 'ACPTD'
	and CLM_LN_DIAG_I.DIAG_CD_TYP_NM IN ('ICD10', 'ICD-10')

expression.expression: COUNT((CASE WHEN ((PregnancyDiagDesc IS NULL) OR (CAST(PregnancyDiagDesc AS STRING) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))
COUNT((CASE WHEN ((Trimester IS NULL) OR (CAST(Trimester AS STRING) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))
COUNT((CASE WHEN ((Trimester IS NULL) OR (CAST(Trimester AS STRING) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))
COUNT((CASE WHEN ((PregnancyDiagDesc IS NULL) OR (CAST(PregnancyDiagDesc AS STRING) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))
COUNT((CASE WHEN ((Trimester IS NULL) OR (CAST(Trimester AS STRING) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))

(CASE WHEN (SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%E3%f%f', CAST(`Service Date` AS string)) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST(SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%E3%f%f', CAST(`Service Date` AS string)) AS DATE) WHEN (SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%%f', CAST(`Service Date` AS string)) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST(SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%%f', CAST(`Service Date` AS string)) AS DATE) ELSE CAST(SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d', CAST(`Service Date` AS string)) AS DATE) END)

(CASE WHEN (SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%E3%f%f', CAST(YEARMONTH AS string)) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST(SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%E3%f%f', CAST(YEARMONTH AS string)) AS DATE) WHEN (SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%%f', CAST(YEARMONTH AS string)) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST(SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%%f', CAST(YEARMONTH AS string)) AS DATE) ELSE CAST(SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d', CAST(YEARMONTH AS string)) AS DATE) END)

warehouseQuery.query:
SELECT MBR_INDV_BE_KEY, CLM_LN_PROC_CD_SK as Knee_Replacement, left(CLM_LN_SVC_STRT_DT_SK,7) as YEARMONTH, CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_SVC_STRT_DT_SK, CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_ALW_AMT from CLM_LN_F 
inner join CLM_F on CLM_F.CLM_SK = CLM_LN_F.CLM_SK
inner join MBR_D on MBR_D.MBR_SK = CLM_F.MBR_SK
WHERE CLM_LN_PROC_CD_SK in (
'55808',
'55857',
'55864',
'57128',
'57125',
'57123',
'57124',
'57132',
'57133',
'57134',
'57158',
'57202',
'55906',
'55951',
'55900',
'55901',
'55903',
'55837',
'55841',
'55793',
'57130',
'57126',
'1822822784',
'55905',
'55959',
'55779',
'55865',
'55806',
'57144',
'57135',
'57159',
'57201',
'55904',
'55838',
'55889',
'55893',
'57129'
) 
AND CLM_LN_SVC_STRT_DT_SK Between char(((Current Date + 1 Days - Day(Current Date) Days) - 60 Months), ISO) And CHAR((LAST_DAY(Current Date - 1 Months)), ISO)

select MBR_D.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY,
	CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_PROC_CD_SK as Neck_Surgery,
	Left(CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_SVC_STRT_DT_SK, 7) as YEARMONTH,
	CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_SVC_STRT_DT_SK,
	CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_ALW_AMT,
	PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD,
	PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_DESC,
	PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_TYP_NM 
from CLM_LN_F 
	inner join CLM_F on CLM_F.CLM_SK = CLM_LN_F.CLM_SK 
	inner join MBR_D on MBR_D.MBR_SK = CLM_F.MBR_SK 
	inner join PROC_CD_D on PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_SK = CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_PROC_CD_SK 
where --left(PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD, 2) IN ('OR', '0S') and 
CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_SVC_STRT_DT_SK Between char(((Current Date + 1 Days - Day(Current Date) Days) - 60 Months), ISO) 
	and CHAR((LAST_Day(Current Date - 1 Months)), ISO)
	and PROC_CD_TYP_NM = 'CPT4'
	and PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD IN (
'22100',
'22110',
'22220',
'22326',
'22548',
'22551',
'22552',
'22554',
'22595',
'22600'
)

select CLM_F.CLM_ID,
	CLM_F.EXP_SUB_CAT_CD,
	CLM_F.CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK,
	MBR_D.MBR_BRTH_DT_SK,
	MBR_D.MBR_FULL_NM,
	MBR_D.MBR_ID,
	MBR_D.MBR_SK,
	MBR_D.SUB_ID,
	CLM_F.SRC_SYS_CD,
	CLM_F.FUND_CAT_CD,
	CLM_LN_DIAG_I.DIAG_CD as PregnancyDiag,
	CLM_LN_DIAG_I.DIAG_CD_DESC as PregnancyDiagDesc,
	CLM_LN_DIAG_I.DIAG_CD_TYP_NM
from CLM_F 
	inner join CLM_LN_DIAG_I on CLM_LN_DIAG_I.CLM_ID = CLM_F.CLM_ID 
	inner join MBR_D on MBR_D.MBR_SK = CLM_F.MBR_SK 
	inner join GRP_D on GRP_D.GRP_SK = MBR_D.GRP_SK
where CLM_F.CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK Between CHAR(((Current Date + 1 Days - Day(Current Date) Days) - 12 Months), ISO) 
	and CHAR((LAST_Day(Current Date - 0 Months)), ISO) 
	and CLM_F.CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK not Like '%UNK%' 
	and CLM_F.CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK not Like '%NA%' 
	and CLM_LN_DIAG_I.DIAG_CD_DESC LIKE '%high risk pregnancy%'
	and CLM_F.CLM_HOST_IN = 'N' 
	and CLM_F.CLM_STTUS_CD IN ('A02', 'A08', 'A09') 
	and CLM_F.CLM_TYP_CD = 'MED' 
	and CLM_F.CLM_CAT_CD = 'STD'
	and CLM_F.CLM_FINL_DISP_CD = 'ACPTD'
	and CLM_LN_DIAG_I.DIAG_CD_TYP_NM IN ('ICD10', 'ICD-10')

condition.expression:
(
  (
    (
      (CAST((SUBSTRING(DIAG_CD, 1, 3)) AS VARCHAR (1000)) IN ('Z332', 'O03', 'O04'))
      OR (
           CAST(PROC_CD AS VARCHAR (1000)) IN (
             '59515',
             '59514',
             '59510',
             '59400',
             '59409',
             '59410',
             '59610',
             '59612',
             '59614',
             '59409',
             '59612',
             '59618',
             '59620',
             '59622',
             '59620',
             '59409',
             '59612',
             'J7296',
             'J7297',
             'J7298',
             'J7300',
             'J7301',
             'J1050'
           )
         )
    )
    OR CAST(((STRPOS((coalesce(LOWER(LOWER(PROC_CD_DESC)), '')), LOWER('salpingectomy'))) > 0) AS BOOLEAN)
  )
  OR CAST(((STRPOS((coalesce(LOWER(LOWER(PROC_CD_DESC)), '')), LOWER('oophorectomy'))) > 0) AS BOOLEAN)
)

expression.expression: CAST(CAST(DATE_DIFF((PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', CAST(CURRENT_DATE AS STRING))), (PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', MIN_CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK)), MONTH) AS INTEGER) AS INTEGER)
COUNT((CASE WHEN ((PregnancyDiagDesc IS NULL) OR (CAST(PregnancyDiagDesc AS STRING) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))

CAST((CASE WHEN (`Time Since First Diagnosis` <= 24) THEN '1. 1-2 years            ' WHEN (`Time Since First Diagnosis` <= 72) THEN '2. 3-6 years            ' WHEN (`Time Since First Diagnosis` <= 120) THEN '3. 7-10 years           ' ELSE '4. Greater than 10 Years' END) AS STRING)
(MAX(Trimester_INT) OVER (PARTITION BY MBR_ID ORDER BY 1 RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW))
(MAX(CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK) OVER (PARTITION BY MBR_ID ORDER BY 1 RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW))
COUNT((CASE WHEN ((Trimester IS NULL) OR (CAST(Trimester AS STRING) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))
(CASE WHEN (in0.MBR_ID = in1.MBR_ID) THEN NULL ELSE 'No' END)
CAST(CAST((DATE_DIFF((PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', CAST(CURRENT_DATE AS STRING))), (PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', MAX_CLM_LN_SVC_STRT_DT_SK)), MONTH) / 12) AS INTEGER) AS string)
CAST(CAST((DATE_DIFF((PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', CAST(CURRENT_DATE AS STRING))), (PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', MIN_CLM_LN_SVC_STRT_DT_SK)), MONTH) / 12) AS INTEGER) AS string)
COUNT((CASE WHEN ((MBR_ID IS NULL) OR (CAST(MBR_ID AS STRING) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))
COUNT((CASE WHEN ((Trimester IS NULL) OR (CAST(Trimester AS STRING) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))

warehouseQuery.query:
select CLM_F.MBR_SK,
	CLM_F.CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK "Service Date",
	CLM_F.DIAG_CD_1_SK,
	CLM_F.NDC_SK,
	CLM_F.CLM_SUBTYP_CD "Claim Type",
	CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_PROC_CD_SK,
	CLM_F.SRC_SYS_CD,
	Sum(CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_PAYBL_AMT) as "Paid Amount",
	CLM_F.FUND_CAT_CD,
	PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD,
	PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_CAT_NM,
	PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_DESC,
	PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_TYP_NM,
	PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_TYP_CD_SK,
	PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_ACTN_TYP_NM,
	PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_CAT_CD,
	PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_TYP_CD 
from PROD.CLM_F CLM_F 
	inner join PROD.CLM_LN_F CLM_LN_F on CLM_LN_F.CLM_SK = CLM_F.CLM_SK 
	inner join PROD.GRP_D as GRP_D on GRP_D.GRP_SK = CLM_F.GRP_SK 
	inner join PROC_CD_D on PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_SK = CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_PROC_CD_SK 
where CLM_F.SRC_SYS_CD in ('ESI', 'OPTUMRX', 'FACETS') 
	and CLM_F.FUND_CAT_CD <> 'FEP' 
	and (CLM_F.CLM_PD_DT_SK >= char(Current Date - Day(Current Date) Days + 1 Day - 5 Years, ISO) or (CLM_F.SRC_SYS_CD = 'OPTUMRX' and CLM_F.CLM_PD_DT_SK = '1753-01-01')) 
	and CLM_F.CLM_CAT_CD = 'STD' 
	and CLM_F.CLM_FINL_DISP_CD = 'ACPTD' 
	and CLM_F.CLM_STTUS_CD in ('A02', 'A08', 'A09') 
	and CLM_F.CLM_TYP_CD = 'MED' 
	and CLM_F.CLM_HOST_IN = 'N' 
group by CLM_F.MBR_SK, CLM_F.CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK, CLM_F.DIAG_CD_1_SK, CLM_F.NDC_SK, CLM_F.CLM_SUBTYP_CD, CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_PROC_CD_SK, CLM_F.SRC_SYS_CD, CLM_F.FUND_CAT_CD, CLM_F.CLM_PD_DT_SK, PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD, PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_CAT_NM, PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_DESC, PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_TYP_NM, PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_TYP_CD_SK, PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_ACTN_TYP_NM, PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_CAT_CD, PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_TYP_CD

expression.expression: CAST((CAST((DATEDIFF((PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK)), (PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', CAST(CURRENT_DATE AS STRING))))) AS INTEGER) / 7) AS DOUBLE)
* EXCEPT(`ICD-10-CM Code Description`, `CCSR Category`, `Inpatient Default CCSR paranthesesOpenYslashNslashXparanthesesClose`, `Outpatient Default CCSR paranthesesOpenYslashNslashXparanthesesClose`)

warehouseQuery.query:
SELECT MBR_INDV_BE_KEY, CLM_LN_PROC_CD_SK as Knee_Replacement, left(CLM_LN_SVC_STRT_DT_SK,7) as YEARMONTH, CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_SVC_STRT_DT_SK, CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_ALW_AMT from CLM_LN_F 
inner join CLM_F on CLM_F.CLM_SK = CLM_LN_F.CLM_SK
inner join MBR_D on MBR_D.MBR_SK = CLM_F.MBR_SK
WHERE CLM_LN_PROC_CD_SK in (56630,56631,56632,56633,56652,56653,56654,56663,
56664,56665)
AND CLM_LN_SVC_STRT_DT_SK Between char(((Current Date + 1 Days - Day(Current Date) Days) - 60 Months), ISO) And CHAR((LAST_DAY(Current Date - 1 Months)), ISO)

expression.expression:
CAST((
  CASE
    WHEN (CAST(PregnancyDiag AS STRING) IN ('Z3A01', 'Z3A08', 'Z3A09', 'Z3A10', 'Z3A11', 'Z3A12'))
      THEN 'First Trimester      '
    WHEN (
      CAST(PregnancyDiag AS STRING) IN (
        'Z3A13',
        'Z3A14',
        'Z3A15',
        'Z3A16',
        'Z3A17',
        'Z3A18',
        'Z3A19',
        'Z3A20',
        'Z3A21',
        'Z3A22',
        'Z3A23',
        'Z3A24',
        'Z3A25',
        'Z3A26',
        'Z3A27'
      )
    )
      THEN 'Second Trimester     '
    WHEN (CAST(PregnancyDiag AS STRING) IN ('Z3A28', 'Z3A29', 'Z3A30', 'Z3A31', 'Z3A32', 'Z3A33', 'Z3A34', 'Z3A35', 'Z3A36', 'Z3A37', 'Z3A38', 'Z3A39', 'Z3A40'))
      THEN 'Third Trimester      '
    WHEN (CAST(PregnancyDiag AS STRING) IN ('Z3A41', 'Z3A42'))
      THEN '> 40 Weeks           '
    ELSE 'Unspecified Trimester'
  END
) AS STRING)

(CASE WHEN ((((((Trimester = '> 40 Weeks') AND (Timed < -4)) OR ((Trimester = 'Third Trimester') AND (Timed < -17))) OR ((Trimester = 'Second Trimester') AND (Timed < -31))) OR ((Trimester = 'First Trimester') AND (Timed < -44))) OR ((Trimester = 'Unspecified Trimester') AND (Timed < -44))) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
(CASE WHEN (in0.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY = in1.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY) THEN NULL ELSE in1.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY END)
(CASE WHEN (in0.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY = in1.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY) THEN NULL ELSE in1.`Diabetes Type` END)
(CASE WHEN (in0.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY = in1.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY) THEN NULL ELSE in1.Min_CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK END)
COUNT((CASE WHEN ((Trimester IS NULL) OR (CAST(Trimester AS STRING) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))
COUNT((CASE WHEN ((PregnancyDiagDesc IS NULL) OR (CAST(PregnancyDiagDesc AS STRING) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))
COUNT((CASE WHEN ((Trimester IS NULL) OR (CAST(Trimester AS STRING) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))
COUNT((CASE WHEN ((PregnancyDiagDesc IS NULL) OR (CAST(PregnancyDiagDesc AS STRING) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))

warehouseQuery.query:
select MBR_D.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY,
	CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_PROC_CD_SK as Neck_Surgery,
	Left(CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_SVC_STRT_DT_SK, 7) as YEARMONTH,
	CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_SVC_STRT_DT_SK,
	CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_ALW_AMT,
	PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD,
	PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_DESC,
	PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_TYP_NM 
from CLM_LN_F 
	inner join CLM_F on CLM_F.CLM_SK = CLM_LN_F.CLM_SK 
	inner join MBR_D on MBR_D.MBR_SK = CLM_F.MBR_SK 
	inner join PROC_CD_D on PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD_SK = CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_PROC_CD_SK 
where --left(PROC_CD_D.PROC_CD, 2) IN ('OR', '0S') and 
CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_SVC_STRT_DT_SK Between char(((Current Date + 1 Days - Day(Current Date) Days) - 60 Months), ISO) 
	and CHAR((LAST_Day(Current Date - 1 Months)), ISO)
	and PROC_CD_TYP_NM = 'CPT4'

properties.filePath: O:\library\Alteryx\Advanced Analytics\Jon Sands\CHS Transfer\MVP Cache\Diagnosis Rollup.xlsx

warehouseQuery.query:
select PROD.MBR_D.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY,
	Left(PROD.CLM_F.CLM_PD_DT_SK, 7) as YEARMONTH,
	PROD.DIAG_CD_D.DIAG_CD_SK as PRI_DIAG_CD_SK,
	PROD.DIAG_CD_D.DIAG_CD_DESC,
	Sum(PROD.CLM_F.CLM_LN_TOT_PAYBL_AMT) as Diag_CD_Cost,
	row_number() 
over 
	(
	partition by PROD.MBR_D.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY, Left(PROD.CLM_F.CLM_PD_DT_SK, 7) 
	order by Sum(PROD.CLM_F.CLM_LN_TOT_PAYBL_AMT) Desc
	) row_no, PROD.DIAG_CD_D.DIAG_CD, CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_SVC_STRT_DT_SK,
	CLM_LN_F.CLM_LN_ALW_AMT 
from PROD.CLM_F 
	inner join PROD.MBR_D on PROD.MBR_D.MBR_SK = PROD.CLM_F.MBR_SK 
	inner join PROD.DIAG_CD_D on PROD.CLM_F.DIAG_CD_1_SK = PROD.DIAG_CD_D.DIAG_CD_SK inner join prod.clm_ln_f on clm_ln_f.clm_id = clm_f.clm_id
where PROD.CLM_F.SRC_SYS_CD in ('FACETS') 
	and PROD.CLM_F.CLM_FINL_DISP_CD = 'ACPTD' 
	and PROD.CLM_F.CLM_STTUS_CD in ('A02', 'A08', 'A09') 
	and PROD.CLM_F.CLM_TYP_CD = 'MED' 
	and PROD.CLM_F.CLM_CAT_CD = 'STD' 
	and (PROD.CLM_F.CLM_PD_DT_SK >= char(Current Date - Day(Current Date) Days + 1 Day - 60 Months, ISO) or (PROD.CLM_F.SRC_SYS_CD = 'OPTUMRX' and PROD.CLM_F.CLM_PD_DT_SK = '1753-01-01')) 
	and left(DIAG_CD_D.DIAG_CD, 3) in (
'M05', 
'M06', 
'M10', 
'M11', 
'M12', 
'M13', 
'M14',

expression.expression: CAST((CASE WHEN (`Time Since Most Recent Diagnosis` > '4') THEN '5 or more years' ELSE CAST((CONCAT(`Time Since Most Recent Diagnosis`, ' year(s)')) AS STRING) END) AS STRING)
CAST((CASE WHEN (`Time Since First Diag` > '4') THEN '5 or more years' ELSE CAST((CONCAT(`Time Since First Diag`, ' year(s)')) AS STRING) END) AS STRING)
* EXCEPT(`time since first diag`, `time since most recent diagnosis`)
COUNT((CASE WHEN ((Trimester IS NULL) OR (CAST(Trimester AS STRING) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))

warehouseQuery.query:
select
	m.mbr_indv_be_key,
	c.clm_svc_strt_dt_sk,
	c.clm_id,
	d.diag_cd_desc,
	d.diag_cd,
	c.clm_ln_tot_alw_amt

from
	prod.mbr_d m
	inner join
		prod.clm_f c on c.mbr_sk = m.mbr_sk
	inner join
		prod.clm_ln_f cl on cl.clm_id = c.clm_id
	inner join
		prod.diag_cd_d d on d.diag_cd_sk = cl.clm_ln_diag_cd_1_sk

where
	m.mbr_indv_be_key != '0'
	and (cl.clm_ln_svc_strt_dt_sk Between char(((Current Date + 1 Days - Day(Current Date) Days) - 60 Months), ISO) 
	and CHAR((LAST_Day(Current Date - 1 Months)), ISO))
	and (left(d.diag_cd,3) = 'N46' or left(d.diag_cd,3) = 'N97')
	and c.CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK not Like '%UNK%' 
	and c.CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK not Like '%NA%'
	and c.CLM_HOST_IN = 'N' 
	and c.CLM_STTUS_CD IN ('A02', 'A08', 'A09') 
	and c.CLM_TYP_CD = 'MED' 
	and c.CLM_CAT_CD = 'STD' 
	and c.CLM_FINL_DISP_CD = 'ACPTD'

union

select
	m.mbr_indv_be_key,
	c.clm_svc_strt_dt_sk,
	c.clm_id,
	d.diag_cd_desc,
	d.diag_cd,
	c.clm_ln_tot_alw_amt

from
	prod.mbr_d m
	inner join
		prod.clm_f c on c.mbr_sk = m.mbr_sk
	inner join
		prod.clm_ln_f cl on cl.clm_id = c.clm_id
	inner join
		prod.diag_cd_d d on d.diag_cd_sk = cl.clm_ln_diag_cd_2_sk

where
	m.mbr_indv_be_key != '0'
	and (cl.clm_ln_svc_strt_dt_sk Between char(((Current Date + 1 Days - Day(Current Date) Days) - 60 Months), ISO) 
	and CHAR((LAST_Day(Current Date - 1 Months)), ISO))
	and (left(d.diag_cd,3) = 'N46' or left(d.diag_cd,3) = 'N97')
	and c.CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK not Like '%UNK%' 
	and c.CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK not Like '%NA%'
	and c.CLM_HOST_IN = 'N' 
	and c.CLM_STTUS_CD IN ('A02', 'A08', 'A09') 
	and c.CLM_TYP_CD = 'MED' 
	and c.CLM_CAT_CD = 'STD' 
	and c.CLM_FINL_DISP_CD = 'ACPTD'

union

select
	m.mbr_indv_be_key,
	c.clm_svc_strt_dt_sk,
	c.clm_id,
	d.diag_cd_desc,
	d.diag_cd,
	c.clm_ln_tot_alw_amt

from
	prod.mbr_d m
	inner join
		prod.clm_f c on c.mbr_sk = m.mbr_sk
	inner join
		prod.clm_ln_f cl on cl.clm_id = c.clm_id
	inner join
		prod.diag_cd_d d on d.diag_cd_sk = cl.clm_ln_diag_cd_3_sk

where
	m.mbr_indv_be_key != '0'
	and (cl.clm_ln_svc_strt_dt_sk Between char(((Current Date + 1 Days - Day(Current Date) Days) - 60 Months), ISO) 
	and CHAR((LAST_Day(Current Date - 1 Months)), ISO))
	and (left(d.diag_cd,3) = 'N46' or left(d.diag_cd,3) = 'N97')
	and c.CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK not Like '%UNK%' 
	and c.CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK not Like '%NA%'
	and c.CLM_HOST_IN = 'N' 
	and c.CLM_STTUS_CD IN ('A02', 'A08', 'A09') 
	and c.CLM_TYP_CD = 'MED' 
	and c.CLM_CAT_CD = 'STD' 
	and c.CLM_FINL_DISP_CD = 'ACPTD'

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (Trimester = 'First Trimester') THEN 1 WHEN (Trimester = 'Second Trimester') THEN 2 WHEN (Trimester = 'Third Trimester') THEN 3 WHEN (Trimester = '> 40 Weeks') THEN 4 ELSE 0 END)
COUNT((CASE WHEN ((Trimester IS NULL) OR (CAST(Trimester AS STRING) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))
COUNT((CASE WHEN ((Trimester IS NULL) OR (CAST(Trimester AS STRING) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))

* EXCEPT(`SRC_SYS_CD`, `MBR_ID`, `MBR_SK`, `Service Date`, `PregnancyDiag`, `PregnancyDiagDesc`, `Claim ID`, `Trimester`, `Trimester_INT`, `Identified High Risk Pregnancy`, `SUB_ID`, `MBR_INDV_BE_KEY`)

condition.expression: (((CAST((SUBSTRING( PregnancyDiag, 1, 3)) AS STRING) = 'O03') OR ((CAST((SUBSTRING( PregnancyDiag, 1, 3)) AS STRING) = 'O04') OR (CAST((SUBSTRING( PregnancyDiag, 1, 3)) AS STRING) = 'P95'))) OR (((CAST((SUBSTRING( PregnancyDiag, 1, 4)) AS STRING) = 'Z332') OR (CAST((SUBSTRING( PregnancyDiag, 1, 4)) AS STRING) = 'O021')) OR ((CAST((SUBSTRING( PregnancyDiag, 1, 4)) AS STRING) = 'O020') OR (CAST((SUBSTRING( PregnancyDiag, 1, 4)) AS STRING) = 'O028'))))

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (Trimester = 'First Trimester') THEN 1 WHEN (Trimester = 'Second Trimester') THEN 2 WHEN (Trimester = 'Third Trimester') THEN 3 ELSE 0 END)

properties.filePath: O:\library\Alteryx\Advanced Analytics\Jon Sands\CHS Transfer\MVP Cache\rr clm_f.csv

warehouseQuery.query:
select MBR_D.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY,
	CLM_F.MBR_SK,
	CLM_F.CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK,
	CLM_F.CLM_ID,
	DIAG.DIAG_CD,
	DIAG.DIAG_CD_DESC,
	NDC.NDC,
	CLM_F.DRUG_CLM_TIER_CD,
	CLM_F.DRUG_CLM_GNRC_DRUG_IN,
	CLM_F.CLM_SUBTYP_CD "Claim Type",
	PROC_D.PROC_CD,
	PROC_D.PROC_CD_DESC,
	CLM_F.SRC_SYS_CD,
	CLM_F.CLM_PAYBL_AMT,
	CLM_F.CLM_LN_TOT_ALW_AMT,
	CLM_F.FUND_CAT_CD,
	PROV.PROV_FCLTY_TYP_NM,
	PROV.PROV_SK,
	PROV.PROV_SPEC_NM,
	PROV.PROV_NM,
	PROV.PROV_BILL_SVC_NM,
	PROV.PROV_CLM_PAYMT_PROV_NM,
	PROV.PROV_REL_GRP_PROV_NM,
	case 
			when CL.CLM_LN_POS_CD = '10' then 'Yes' 
			else 'No' 
		end as TELE_HEALTH_IND 
from PROD.CLM_F CLM_F 
	inner join PROD.MBR_D as MBR_D on MBR_D.MBR_SK = CLM_F.MBR_SK 
	inner join PROD.MBR_ENR_D as MBR_ENR_D on MBR_ENR_D.MBR_SK = MBR_D.MBR_SK
	inner join PROD.GRP_D as GRP_D on GRP_D.GRP_SK = CLM_F.GRP_SK 
	inner join PROD.DIAG_CD_D as DIAG on DIAG.DIAG_CD_SK = CLM_F.DIAG_CD_1_SK 
	inner join PROD.PROC_CD_D as PROC_D on PROC_D.PROC_CD_SK = CLM_F.PROC_CD_1_SK 
	inner join PROD.PROV_D as PROV on PROV.PROV_SK = CLM_F.SVC_PROV_SK 
	inner join PROD.CLM_LN_F as CL on CL.CLM_SK = CLM_F.CLM_SK 
	inner join PROD.NDC_D as NDC on NDC.NDC_SK = CLM_F.NDC_SK 
where  
	CLM_F.CLM_SUBTYP_CD in ('IP', 'OP', 'RX', 'PR') 
	and CLM_F.SRC_SYS_CD in ('FACETS', 'ARGUS', 'PCS', 'ESI', 'OPTUMRX', 'WELLDYNERX', 'MCSOURCE', 'MCAID', 'BCA') 
	and CLM_F.CLM_CAT_CD = 'STD' 
	and CLM_F.CLM_FINL_DISP_CD = 'ACPTD' 
	and CLM_F.CLM_STTUS_CD in ('A02', 'A08', 'A09') 
	and CLM_F.CLM_TYP_CD = 'MED' 
	and CLM_F.CLM_HOST_IN = 'N'
	and MBR_ENR_D.MBR_ENR_ELIG_IN = 'Y'
	and (CL.CLM_LN_FINL_DISP_CD in ('ACPTD', 'DENIEDREJ') or (CL.CLM_LN_FINL_DISP_CD in ('NA') and CL.SRC_SYS_CD in ('ARGUS', 'PCS')))
	and (left(DIAG.DIAG_CD,3) = 'E08' or left(DIAG.DIAG_CD,3)='E09' or left(DIAG.DIAG_CD,3)='E10' or left(DIAG.DIAG_CD,3)='E11' or left(DIAG.DIAG_CD,3)='E13')

union

select MBR_D.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY,
	CLM_F.MBR_SK,
	CLM_F.CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK,
	CLM_F.CLM_ID,
	DIAG.DIAG_CD,
	DIAG.DIAG_CD_DESC,
	NDC.NDC,
	CLM_F.DRUG_CLM_TIER_CD,
	CLM_F.DRUG_CLM_GNRC_DRUG_IN,
	CLM_F.CLM_SUBTYP_CD "Claim Type",
	PROC_D.PROC_CD,
	PROC_D.PROC_CD_DESC,
	CLM_F.SRC_SYS_CD,
	CLM_F.CLM_PAYBL_AMT,
	CLM_F.CLM_LN_TOT_ALW_AMT,
	CLM_F.FUND_CAT_CD,
	PROV.PROV_FCLTY_TYP_NM,
	PROV.PROV_SK,
	PROV.PROV_SPEC_NM,
	PROV.PROV_NM,
	PROV.PROV_BILL_SVC_NM,
	PROV.PROV_CLM_PAYMT_PROV_NM,
	PROV.PROV_REL_GRP_PROV_NM,
	case 
			when CL.CLM_LN_POS_CD = '10' then 'Yes' 
			else 'No' 
		end as TELE_HEALTH_IND 
from PROD.CLM_F CLM_F 
	inner join PROD.MBR_D as MBR_D on MBR_D.MBR_SK = CLM_F.MBR_SK 
	inner join PROD.MBR_ENR_D as MBR_ENR_D on MBR_ENR_D.MBR_SK = MBR_D.MBR_SK
	inner join PROD.GRP_D as GRP_D on GRP_D.GRP_SK = CLM_F.GRP_SK 
	inner join PROD.DIAG_CD_D as DIAG on DIAG.DIAG_CD_SK = CLM_F.DIAG_CD_2_SK 
	inner join PROD.PROC_CD_D as PROC_D on PROC_D.PROC_CD_SK = CLM_F.PROC_CD_1_SK 
	inner join PROD.PROV_D as PROV on PROV.PROV_SK = CLM_F.SVC_PROV_SK 
	inner join PROD.CLM_LN_F as CL on CL.CLM_SK = CLM_F.CLM_SK 
	inner join PROD.NDC_D as NDC on NDC.NDC_SK = CLM_F.NDC_SK 
where CLM_F.CLM_SUBTYP_CD in ('IP', 'OP', 'RX', 'PR') 
	and CLM_F.SRC_SYS_CD in ('FACETS', 'ARGUS', 'PCS', 'ESI', 'OPTUMRX', 'WELLDYNERX', 'MCSOURCE', 'MCAID', 'BCA') 
	and CLM_F.CLM_CAT_CD = 'STD' 
	and CLM_F.CLM_FINL_DISP_CD = 'ACPTD' 
	and CLM_F.CLM_STTUS_CD in ('A02', 'A08', 'A09') 
	and CLM_F.CLM_TYP_CD = 'MED' 
	and CLM_F.CLM_HOST_IN = 'N'
	and MBR_ENR_D.MBR_ENR_ELIG_IN = 'Y'
	and (CL.CLM_LN_FINL_DISP_CD in ('ACPTD', 'DENIEDREJ') or (CL.CLM_LN_FINL_DISP_CD in ('NA') and CL.SRC_SYS_CD in ('ARGUS', 'PCS')))
	and (left(DIAG.DIAG_CD,3) = 'E08' or left(DIAG.DIAG_CD,3)='E09' or left(DIAG.DIAG_CD,3)='E10' or left(DIAG.DIAG_CD,3)='E11' or left(DIAG.DIAG_CD,3)='E13')

union

select MBR_D.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY,
	CLM_F.MBR_SK,
	CLM_F.CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK,
	CLM_F.CLM_ID,
	DIAG.DIAG_CD,
	DIAG.DIAG_CD_DESC,
	NDC.NDC,
	CLM_F.DRUG_CLM_TIER_CD,
	CLM_F.DRUG_CLM_GNRC_DRUG_IN,
	CLM_F.CLM_SUBTYP_CD "Claim Type",
	PROC_D.PROC_CD,
	PROC_D.PROC_CD_DESC,
	CLM_F.SRC_SYS_CD,
	CLM_F.CLM_PAYBL_AMT,
	CLM_F.CLM_LN_TOT_ALW_AMT,
	CLM_F.FUND_CAT_CD,
	PROV.PROV_FCLTY_TYP_NM,
	PROV.PROV_SK,
	PROV.PROV_SPEC_NM,
	PROV.PROV_NM,
	PROV.PROV_BILL_SVC_NM,
	PROV.PROV_CLM_PAYMT_PROV_NM,
	PROV.PROV_REL_GRP_PROV_NM,
	case 
			when CL.CLM_LN_POS_CD = '10' then 'Yes' 
			else 'No' 
		end as TELE_HEALTH_IND 
from PROD.CLM_F CLM_F 
	inner join PROD.MBR_D as MBR_D on MBR_D.MBR_SK = CLM_F.MBR_SK 
	inner join PROD.MBR_ENR_D as MBR_ENR_D on MBR_ENR_D.MBR_SK = MBR_D.MBR_SK
	inner join PROD.GRP_D as GRP_D on GRP_D.GRP_SK = CLM_F.GRP_SK 
	inner join PROD.DIAG_CD_D as DIAG on DIAG.DIAG_CD_SK = CLM_F.DIAG_CD_3_SK 
	inner join PROD.PROC_CD_D as PROC_D on PROC_D.PROC_CD_SK = CLM_F.PROC_CD_1_SK 
	inner join PROD.PROV_D as PROV on PROV.PROV_SK = CLM_F.SVC_PROV_SK 
	inner join PROD.CLM_LN_F as CL on CL.CLM_SK = CLM_F.CLM_SK 
	inner join PROD.NDC_D as NDC on NDC.NDC_SK = CLM_F.NDC_SK 
where CLM_F.CLM_SUBTYP_CD in ('IP', 'OP', 'RX', 'PR') 
	and CLM_F.SRC_SYS_CD in ('FACETS', 'ARGUS', 'PCS', 'ESI', 'OPTUMRX', 'WELLDYNERX', 'MCSOURCE', 'MCAID', 'BCA') 
	and CLM_F.CLM_CAT_CD = 'STD' 
	and CLM_F.CLM_FINL_DISP_CD = 'ACPTD' 
	and CLM_F.CLM_STTUS_CD in ('A02', 'A08', 'A09') 
	and CLM_F.CLM_TYP_CD = 'MED' 
	and CLM_F.CLM_HOST_IN = 'N'
	and MBR_ENR_D.MBR_ENR_ELIG_IN = 'Y'
	and (CL.CLM_LN_FINL_DISP_CD in ('ACPTD', 'DENIEDREJ') or (CL.CLM_LN_FINL_DISP_CD in ('NA') and CL.SRC_SYS_CD in ('ARGUS', 'PCS')))
	and (left(DIAG.DIAG_CD,3) = 'E08' or left(DIAG.DIAG_CD,3)='E09' or left(DIAG.DIAG_CD,3)='E10' or left(DIAG.DIAG_CD,3)='E11' or left(DIAG.DIAG_CD,3)='E13')

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%E3%f%f', CAST(CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK AS string)) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST(SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%E3%f%f', CAST(CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK AS string)) AS DATE) WHEN (SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%%f', CAST(CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK AS string)) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST(SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%%f', CAST(CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK AS string)) AS DATE) ELSE CAST(SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d', CAST(CLM_SVC_STRT_DT_SK AS string)) AS DATE) END)

CAST((CASE WHEN ((STRPOS((coalesce(LOWER(DIAG_CD_DESC), '')), LOWER('Type 1'))) > 0) THEN '1. Type 1' WHEN ((STRPOS((coalesce(LOWER(DIAG_CD_DESC), '')), LOWER('Type 2'))) > 0) THEN '2. Type 2' ELSE '3. Unsure' END) AS STRING)

warehouseQuery.query:
SELECT DIAG_CD, DIAG_CD_SK, DIAG_CD_DESC
FROM DIAG_CD_D

expression.expression: COUNT((CASE WHEN ((Trimester IS NULL) OR (CAST(Trimester AS STRING) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))
